name: posthog
description: Access analytics, feature flags, and user insights from PostHog

tools.name: Get Trends
tools.description: Retrieve event trends and analytics data

tools.name: List Feature Flags
tools.description: List all feature flags in your PostHog project

tools.name: Capture Event
tools.description: Track a custom event in PostHog

prompts.title: Trend analysis
prompts.prompt: Show me the trends for key events in my PostHog project over the last 7 days.

prompts.title: Feature flag status
prompts.prompt: List all active feature flags and their current rollout status.

prompts.title: User insights
prompts.prompt: Give me insights about recent user activity and top users in my PostHog project.
